projects.title: Cloud Security Orchestrator
projects.description: Enterprise-grade cloud security orchestration platform that automates threat detection, incident response, and compliance monitoring across multi-cloud environments.
projects.longDescription: A comprehensive cloud security platform built with Python and integrated with major cloud providers. Features real-time threat detection, automated remediation workflows, and compliance reporting. The system processes over 10 million security events daily and provides actionable insights through machine learning algorithms.

projects.title: DevSecOps Pipeline Framework
projects.description: Automated CI/CD pipeline framework with integrated security scanning, vulnerability assessment, and compliance validation for containerized applications.
projects.longDescription: A complete DevSecOps pipeline solution that integrates security at every stage of the development lifecycle. Features automated security scanning, SAST/DAST testing, container vulnerability assessment, and policy-as-code implementation. Deployed across 50+ microservices in production.

projects.title: Python Security Toolkit
projects.description: Comprehensive Python toolkit for security professionals featuring automated penetration testing, vulnerability scanning, and incident response capabilities.
projects.longDescription: An extensive collection of Python-based security tools designed for cybersecurity professionals. Includes modules for network scanning, web application testing, malware analysis, and forensic investigation. The toolkit is used by security teams across multiple organizations.

projects.title: Kubernetes Security Monitor
projects.description: Real-time Kubernetes security monitoring solution with threat detection, policy enforcement, and compliance reporting for container workloads.
projects.longDescription: Advanced Kubernetes security platform that provides continuous monitoring, threat detection, and policy enforcement for container environments. Features runtime security monitoring, admission controllers, and automated compliance reporting for CIS benchmarks and security best practices.

projects.title: Infrastructure as Code Security Scanner
projects.description: Automated security scanning solution for Infrastructure as Code templates with policy validation, misconfiguration detection, and compliance checking.
projects.longDescription: Comprehensive IaC security scanner that analyzes Terraform, CloudFormation, and Kubernetes manifests for security misconfigurations. Integrates with CI/CD pipelines to prevent insecure infrastructure deployments and ensures compliance with security policies.

projects.title: Threat Intelligence Platform
projects.description: AI-powered threat intelligence platform that aggregates, analyzes, and correlates security data from multiple sources to provide actionable insights.
projects.longDescription: Advanced threat intelligence platform that collects data from various threat feeds, analyzes patterns using machine learning, and provides real-time threat indicators. The platform helps security teams stay ahead of emerging threats and make informed decisions.

projects.title: Serverless Security Framework
projects.description: Security framework for serverless applications with runtime protection, function monitoring, and automated threat response capabilities.
projects.longDescription: Comprehensive security solution designed specifically for serverless architectures. Provides runtime application self-protection (RASP), function-level monitoring, and automated threat response for AWS Lambda, Azure Functions, and Google Cloud Functions.

projects.title: API Security Gateway
projects.description: High-performance API security gateway with real-time threat detection, rate limiting, authentication, and comprehensive API protection features.
projects.longDescription: Enterprise-grade API security gateway that provides comprehensive protection for REST and GraphQL APIs. Features include real-time threat detection, sophisticated rate limiting, OAuth2/JWT authentication, and detailed API analytics. Handles millions of API requests daily.

projects.title: Multicloud DevSecOps Blueprints
projects.description: Terraform blueprints and policy packs for secure AWS and Azure landing zones with automated drift detection and compliance reporting.
projects.longDescription: Modular infrastructure-as-code stacks that provision production-ready landing zones across AWS and Azure. The project ships with CIS-mapped guardrails, Sentinel policies, and Python automation that detects configuration drift and publishes security reports. Ideal for demonstrating multicloud governance expertise.
highlights: AWS Control Tower & Azure Landing Zone automation
Policy-as-code guardrails mapped to CIS benchmarks
Python drift detection utilities with GitHub Actions integration
Extensible design ready for GCP adoption

projects.title: Multi-Stage Secure CI/CD
projects.description: End-to-end CI/CD pipeline that builds, scans, signs, and deploys a FastAPI microservice to EKS and AKS with progressive delivery controls.
projects.longDescription: A GitHub Actions pipeline that runs linting, type checking, unit tests, SBOM generation, vulnerability scanning, and Terraform gated deployments. Container images are signed and promoted through preview, staging, and production environments with manual approvals and automated DAST coverage.
highlights: Security scans embedded at every pipeline stage
SBOM and image signing workflow with cosign-ready artifacts
Supports deployment to both AWS EKS and Azure AKS
Preview environments backed by Terraform plans

projects.title: Cloud Cost & Compliance Monitor
projects.description: Serverless automation that correlates AWS cost anomalies and Azure Policy drift with unified ChatOps alerts.
projects.longDescription: Combines AWS Lambda and Azure automation scripts to surface spend anomalies and compliance violations in near real time. Terraform modules provision monitoring resources while Python functions aggregate findings and send actionable notifications to chat platforms.
highlights: Automated cost anomaly detection via AWS Cost Explorer
Azure Policy compliance reporting with remediation insights
